geographic_restrictions: New York state residents and students from historically disadvantaged backgrounds
project_area: Undergraduate admissions and student support services
demographic_requirements: Low-income first-year and transfer students from historically disadvantaged backgrounds for EOP; international students must demonstrate English proficiency and sufficient funds; all applicants must meet academic standards
eligibility_summary: Open to first-year, transfer, international, non-degree seeking, visiting, and older adult students. Specific programs like EOP have additional financial and academic criteria. Geographic restrictions apply to New York state residents and certain international students.
